name: Bug report
about: Report unexpected behavior or a regression

## Description

What happens, in one sentence.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happens. Paste relevant logs / stack traces inside code blocks.

## Environment

- OS : [e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python : [e.g. 3.13.1]
- Etz Chaim AI version or commit : [`git rev-parse HEAD`]
- PostgreSQL version : [e.g. 16.2]

## Additional context

Any relevant module (bridge / mazalengine / partzufim / ...), related assertions (EC-*, Z-*), or related issues.
